action: Provide an image or video of Krishna in playful action.
fallback_action: If this action fails in the future, retry by creating another image or video using the description 'Krishna in playful action'.

recipe.steps: Check for any pre-existing images or videos of Krishna in playful action in the stored metadata.
If no pre-existing data is found, create an image of Krishna in playful action using the description 'Krishna stealing butter while smiling mischievously.'.
Save the generated image URL in memory under an appropriate key for future reference.
